title: Architecture in The Witness
creator: Luis Antonio and Jonathan Blow
description: A development note about making architecture and puzzle scenarios together rather than treating buildings as neutral decoration.
useful: A concrete case where level design, puzzle design, and visual development cannot be separated into clean stages.

manualLinkStatus.note: Official article opened successfully in a browser; the site rejects some automated checks.

audience: Level designers, environment artists, and puzzle designers working on spatial problems together.
learning: Develop architecture and puzzles as one system
Use spaces to frame player attention
Avoid treating environment art as late decoration
